parameters.query: SELECT id, telegram_id, first_name, age, gender, weight_kg, goal, activity_level, daily_calorie_target FROM users WHERE telegram_id=$1
SELECT log_date, calories_consumed, protein_g, carbs_g, fat_g, sleep_hours, energy_level, food_description FROM daily_logs WHERE user_id=$1 ORDER BY log_date DESC LIMIT 7
INSERT INTO supplement_recommendations (user_id, goal_at_time, recommendations, raw_ai_response) VALUES ($1, $2, '[]'::jsonb, $3)
INSERT INTO feature_events (user_id, feature_id, event_type, payload) VALUES ($1, 'supplement_advisor', 'supplement_recommended', '{}'::jsonb)
